_comment: Machine-readable record of every binary patch applied to unpacked_Goley_.exe.
ImageBase is 0x00400000. Addresses below are absolute (image base + RVA).
When you change this file, update docs/IDA_PATCHES.md too.
save_patched.py reads this with --apply to re-create unpacked_Goley_PATCHED.exe
without needing an interactive IDA session for each patch.

patches.name: GameGuard error reporter prologue
patches.comment: Replace prologue with xor eax,eax; ret 4 -- function becomes no-op.
patches.original_hint: any normal x86 prologue (push ebp; mov ebp,esp; ...)

patches.name: nProtect event callback always-success
patches.comment: Replace prologue with mov eax,1; ret 8 -- every event reports success without setting byte_12BAA08 or zeroing init_ok flag.

reverted_patches.name: nProtect event dispatcher stub (REVERTED)
reverted_patches.comment: Stub-prologue patch (mov eax,1; ret 12). Caused Working Set to regress from 42 MB back to 26 MB because legitimate init also bypassed. Do not re-apply without a surgical replacement.
